title: Vertex acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion as biotech M&A booms
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals completes a $10 billion acquisition of Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, signaling continued momentum in biotech M&A activity. The blockbuster deal reflects Vertex's strategy to expand its pipeline through strategic acquisitions amid a hot merger and acquisition environment in the sector.

title: AI company Anthropic announces it will begin developing drugs of its own
summary: Anthropic, the leading AI company behind Claude, announced plans to enter drug development directly, expanding beyond AI tools into independent therapeutic discovery. The move underscores growing convergence between artificial intelligence and pharmaceutical R&D, positioning Anthropic as a frontier player in AI-driven drug discovery.

title: Online GLP-1 prescriptions are often fast, easy and low on clinical oversight
summary: A JAMA-published study by Yale researchers using a secret-shopper methodology found that online GLP-1 prescription platforms offer rapid, easy access with minimal clinical oversight. The findings raise patient safety concerns about the lack of adequate medical evaluation in telehealth prescriptions for GLP-1 drugs, which are widely used for diabetes and weight management.
